name: Card with Badge
description: Card component with status or category badge

usageGuidance.when: Displaying content with status, category, or tag information
antiPatterns: Don't use more than 2-3 badges per card - becomes cluttered
Don't use badge for primary card title - use Card title prop instead

notes.placement: Badge typically goes in card header or top-right corner
notes.variants: Use semantic badge variants (success, warning, error, info) for status
notes.multiple: When using multiple badges, keep them in the same area (all in header)

examples.name: Multiple badges
examples.description: Card with status and priority badges
